findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in AlertEngine::evaluate
findings.description: get_latest returns nullptr for unregistered sensor ID 6, then reading->value is dereferenced

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in find_max_reading
findings.description: get_latest returns nullptr for nonexistent sensor ID 99, then r->value is dereferenced in comparison

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in ingest_readings via parse_reading
findings.description: parse_reading returns nullptr on malformed input, then parsed->sensor_id is dereferenced without check

findings.title: NULL pointer dereference in compare_sensors
findings.description: User-supplied sensor IDs passed to get_latest which returns nullptr, both r1 and r2 dereferenced without checks

findings.title: Division by zero in compute_average from all-NULL returns
findings.description: NULL check on individual readings masks missing count validation, division by zero when all sensor IDs are invalid
